items.title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been active with major announcements heading into April 2026. Most notably, the company raised $122 billion in a new funding round to accelerate its next phase of AI development, with enterprise revenue now comprising over 40% of total revenue and on track to reach parity with consumer revenue by end of 2026. Codex, OpenAI's AI coding tool, now serves over 2 million weekly users — up 5x in three months — and recently received pay-as-you-go pricing for teams, reflecting rapid adoption
